summary: TTS | Navigation options middle left when a Team is selected
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user has one of the following teams set as the Favorite Team: BAL, CWS, COL, KC, MIA, NYM, PIT, SF
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN the user scrolls to highlight the set favorite team
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'The {selected team} is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your favorite team. Move right, up, or down to hear additional teams to favorite. Move left to highlight the “Done” button.'
